name: Core Engineering
description: Shared foundations in math, physics, mechanics, thermodynamics, and design.

name: Electrical Engineering
description: Circuits, electronics, signals, electromagnetics, and control.

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: Mechanics, thermal systems, manufacturing, and mechatronics.

name: Civil Engineering
description: Structures, geotechnics, transportation, water, and infrastructure.

name: Chemical Engineering
description: Transport, thermodynamics, reaction engineering, and process systems.

name: Computer Engineering
description: Digital systems, embedded hardware, architecture, and software systems.

name: Aerospace Engineering
description: Aerodynamics, structures, propulsion, and flight systems.

name: Biomedical Engineering
description: Biological systems, instrumentation, imaging, and medical devices.

name: Industrial Engineering
description: Optimization, operations research, systems design, and quality.

name: Materials Engineering
description: Structure-property relationships, characterization, and materials design.
